title: Hythrope IV

{{Quote|<nowiki />''[…]'' I must admit my distrust toward Northal never faded. Never, that is, until the time he saved the entire group, including myself, on Hythrope IV.|Personal addendum by General Airen Cracken to an entry of a datafile detailing Rebel Alliance operatives dedicated to Vin Northal|<ref name="CRO" />}}
'''Hythrope IV''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Hythrope system/Legends|Hythrope system]], a part of the [[Hythrope sector/Legends|Hythrope sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="Trailing Sectors" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the site of a building where, at one point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] that shortly followed the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Advisory Council (Alliance)|Advisory Council]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was present.<ref name="CRO" />

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] sprung a [[Ambush on Hythrope IV|trap]] on the group by attacking the building with a force of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] accompanied by a [[Hovertank/Legends|repulsortank]]. However, [[Vin Northal/Legends|Vin Northal]]—a former [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guardsman]], Imperial defector, and Rebel [[operative]]—disabled the [[Tank/Legends|tank]] with a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] and used a [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]] to defeat the remaining Imperial [[Soldier/Legends|troops]], saving the lives of the members of the Advisory Council. That body subsequently left Hythrope IV, narrowly avoiding being [[Death/Legends|killed]] while departing the [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Later, Alliance [[General/Legends|general]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] mentioned the ambush on Hythrope IV in an entry of a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives dedicated to Northal.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hythrope IV was created by [[David R. Tulo, Jr.]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Hythrope system, and therefore Hythrope IV, in grid square M-15.<ref name="TEA" />
